title: RBI (Small Finance Banks – Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
The RBI permits borrower accounts to retain or regain Standard status after resolution plan implementation. This provides relief for calamity-affected borrowers while maintaining prudential discipline.
The post RBI (Small Finance Banks – Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
